title: Refund status chip
description: Composite chip showing the refund's overall state — combines status + optional provider_error indicator + optional requires_approval indicator into a single at-a-glance signal. Colour + icon + text label. Never colour-alone. Priority order: 'Failed' > 'Provider error' > 'Rejected' > 'Cancelled' > 'Succeeded' > 'Processing' > 'Approved' > 'Awaiting approval' > 'Pending'.

requiresApproval.description: When status='awaiting_approval', show an 'Approval required' variant of the awaiting_approval chip.

variant.$expr: ({ pending: 'neutral', awaiting_approval: 'warning', approved: 'accent', processing: 'accent', succeeded: 'success', failed: 'danger', cancelled: 'neutral', provider_error: 'danger', rejected: 'danger' })[props.status]

leadingIcon.$expr: props.showIcon ? ({ pending: 'clock', awaiting_approval: 'clock', approved: 'check-badge', processing: 'arrow-path', succeeded: 'check-circle', failed: 'x-circle', cancelled: 'no-symbol', provider_error: 'exclamation-triangle', rejected: 'hand-raised' })[props.status] : null

children.$expr: ({ pending: 'Pending', awaiting_approval: 'Awaiting approval', approved: 'Approved', processing: 'Processing', succeeded: 'Succeeded', failed: 'Failed', cancelled: 'Cancelled', provider_error: 'Provider error', rejected: 'Rejected' })[props.status]
